expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'). There are no visible scroll arrows or indicators to show users the content is horizontally scrollable.
The navigation tab 'Hot Gam' is truncated at the right edge of the screen with no visual scroll indicator, making it unclear to users that there are more navigation options available.

Game titles in the right-side partially visible cards are unreadable (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO', 'MUNC MI'), providing no useful information and appearing visually broken rather than intentional peek-scrolling.

The bottom navigation bar icons have inconsistent visual weight — the active 'Casino' tab uses an orange cherry icon style that differs significantly in style from the other navigation icons, creating a visually inconsistent tab bar.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions a misspelling of 'Jackpots' as 'Jacpots'; all reported issues describe layout, truncation, and styling problems.
